rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
This course is consisted of three parts: Preparatory sessions, short-term volunteering abroad and post assessment. During the preparatory session, students will prepare for volunteering abroad program by themselves with the support of the instructors. Students will be assessed by reporting on what they experienced and learned at the culmination of the course.
Subsequently, students will participate in an intensive volunteer course at a location overseas of their choosing for 2-5 weeks. Currently, there are destinations in Africa, the Americas, Asia, Australasia, and Europe.
After finishing their volunteer abroad program, students will be required to do post program presentation about their experience abroad in Japanese or English and submit the final report.
aims:
To facilitate volunteering abroad for those students who are seeking an alternative to traditional study abroad, or who want to experience volunteering abroad as a prelude to working in specialised fields. The objectives are are for students to develop personally, and in terms of second language proficiency and intercultural competency.
従来の留学とは異なる経験を求めている学生や、専門分野での就労に備えて海外でのボランティア活動を経験したい学生を対象に、海外でのボランティア活動を促進する。学生が個人的に成長し、第二言語能力と異文化対応能力を向上させることを目的としている。
goals: Students will develop personal skills through planning and participating in an international volunteer experience
Students will develop intercultural communication skills through an international volunteer experience
Students will develop intercultural communication skills through an international volunteer experience
Students will improve their second language (either English, Spanish, Chinese or Korean) proficiency through practical use
Students will develop a deeper understanding of global issues through an international volunteer experience
Students will develop as global citizens through an international volunteer experience

plan.text: Introduction to the course, course objectives and assessment processes

prereq: This course is taught in English so students will need to have basic English communication skills that will allow them to prepare for and participate in study abroad by themselves.
prep: Student will be expected to do class preparation at home.
teachers: ◎ マイケル シャープ

教員の実務経験との関連
The instructor has extensive experience of traveling, studying and working abroad, experiences which will enable him to provide informed guidance to participating students.
講師は海外での旅行、留学、就労の経験が豊富であり、それらの経験から、参加学生に適切な指導を行うことができる。

その他
The preparatory sessions focus on
Dealing with the pragmatics such as flight reservations, passport applications, course reservations, etc.
Communication strategies that can be used when negotiating intercultural communicative encounters
